title: Echinolaena navicularis
taxonomy: Echinolaena navicularis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Echinolaena navicularis includes its kingdom as Plantae, phylum as Liliopsida, class as Liliopsida, order as Poales, family as Poaceae, genus as Echinolaena, and species as E. navicularis. The genus Echinolaena is closely related to the genus Elymandra. Echinolaena navicularis is a member of the subtribe Elymandrinae within the tribe Andropogoneae.
